title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
desc: The presenter explores strange weapons that include a million bats with tiny bombs strapped to their chests, inflatable tanks and robot assassins.

title: Daksineshwar - Legends of Kali
desc: The filmmaker focuses on the rich mythology of the prominent Hindu Goddess Kali and the history of one of the most famous temples dedicated to her in Dakshineswar, Kolkata, India.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: Jessica signs up to move a half-ton steampunk robot in a single day. Meanwhile, Todd and Tamera realise that moonshine stills and porcelain plates don't mix well.

title: Storage Wars
desc: On a cold day in Banning, Laura comforts the buyers with hot cocoa and umbrellas. Meanwhile, Kenny risks his money on the contents of a mysterious file cabinet.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: While Brandi experiences one of her most frustrating day, Lisa channels her grandmother in order to elevate her profit during a deal.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: The host meets Harish Tiwari, who excels in data science and table tennis trick shots. Additionally, he balances his professional expertise with an impressive ability to perform extraordinary feats.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: Four smiths must forge signature blades from the metal found in various household items. After a couple tough rounds, two smiths head to their forges to recreate one of history's most iconic sabres.

desc: A shipment of medical equipment takes a weird turn when Jenn learns that her load is a lot more different than expected.

desc: Decorated soldiers, officers and experts reminisce and narrate the exemplary stories of grit and valour from the Kargil War, highlighting the sacrifice of the Indian Armed Forces.

title: Counting Cars
desc: Ryan reluctantly customises a Cadillac as part of a personal project. Inspired by this, Danny checks out a collection of Cadillacs while Paulie and Mike try to purchase a rare Chevrolet Camaro.

desc: From Mehrangarh to Gwalior, the presenter sheds light on some of the most formidable forts in India and the secrets that lie within their walls.

title: The Fast History Of
desc: The documentarian tells the story of the most successful pizza franchise on the planet, which includes drones, muscle cars and a lot of dough.

title: Life After People
desc: In the absence of humans, the deserts which were once subdued will return to reclaim great victories, from the shimmering lights of Las Vegas to the towering glory of Dubai's Burj Khalifa.

desc: The crew works hard to restore a rare British 1950s Ariel Square-Four motorcycle. Meanwhile, Tyler helps Ron and Leonard sharpen their fork-lift skills.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: Elite bladesmiths gather at Texarkana's Bill Moran School, America's oldest bladesmithing institution where the three top artisans face gruelling trials, pushing their craft to extremes.

desc: Under an innovative program run by the government of Himachal Pradesh, inmates are allowed to leave the prison by day for employment and return back by night.

title: Flavours of Tamil Nadu
desc: The host travels to the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, also known as the 'Land of the Temples', to explore its rich history, culture and traditions.

title: History's Greatest Heists With Pierce Brosnan
desc: Elite thieves plot an audacious heist at New York's prestigious Pierre Hotel where they meticulously time their operation, targeting the lobby vault and its wealth of safe deposit boxes.
